fragments.name: reviewed-structural-draft-surface
fragments.description: Declares the reviewed structural draft as the pre-contract review artifact immediately before promotion into the JSON Structure contract.

fragments.name: json-structure-contract-surface
fragments.description: Declares JSON Structure as the first authored serialization surface of the canonical structural model.

fragments.name: auxiliary-graph-boundary
fragments.description: Declares graph-like workflow aids as optional, non-authoritative, and disposable after draft promotion.

fragments.name: derived-export-family
fragments.description: Declares the preferred derived export family for schema, constraints, and preservation reporting.

fragments.name: minimum-lineage-expectations
fragments.description: Declares the minimum lineage expectations for draft, contract, normalized, admitted, and derived export artifacts.

notes: Authoritative extension module for the revised prose-to-contract workflow boundary. It binds the first contract surface, graph non-authority rule, derived export family, and minimum lineage semantics without introducing runtime orchestration.
